title: AtriocSMP Modpack
description: The recommended default Modpack for the AtriocSMP. Also a good client-side low modification base Modpack for SMPs.
body:
The recommended default Modpack for the AtriocSMP!

Contains mostly lightweight client site mods.

The most notable mods are Simple Voice Chat (allowing in-game voice chat), AppleSkin (which makes the hunger bar provide more information about saturation, and the food you're holding), Minecraft Emote (allowing emojis to be used from different Twitch Channels in the in-game chat), and Zoomify (which allows you to zoom in).

This modpack is pre-setup to use Atrioc's Twitch Channel for the emotes. The ASMP server should already be in the multiplayer server list.

The Modpack also includes some off-by-default mostly cosmetic mods that you can enable to make Minecraft look/play a little better.

This Modpack was created for users of the AtriocSMP (discord.gg/asmp). It is not required to play on the server, but it is recommended! If you aren’t a member of the server, you can feel free to use it as well, it would hopefully make a good base pack for a client-side Modpack.


Useful default key bindings:
- Push to talk: Caps Lock
- Voice Chat Menu: V
- Zoom in: C
